violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food stored on the floor in the freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the kitchen area needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The outside of the freezer in the dry storage room needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use lids stored on the floor in the dry storage area.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Glass light bulbs in dry storage area and the kitchen do not have proper covers.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
